coverage.note: only AR (0.67) and CR (0.959) measured; TTL 0/30 and LRU 1/6 are answer-format-mismatch boundaries that need task-specific harnesses (P67-C). No upstream baseline captured.

claimBoundary.reason: Cleanest methodology of all benchmarks (deterministic upstream match-mode scoring, NO LLM judge, so no same-model bias), but blocked by incomplete coverage (TTL/LRU unfinished) and a missing upstream baseline. P67-C task-specific harnesses (TTL classification, LRU multiple-choice with 50+ rows) plus a baseline make this the fastest honest deterministic public claim.
